insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every new session is an opportunity to build momentum and establish a strong foundation, so start by setting a achievable goal for your first session and take that crucial first step. By doing so, you'll be able to break the ice, gain initial feedback, and start tracking your progress, which will help you identify areas of improvement and develop a growth mindset from the very beginning.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
